game_name: Princess Tomato in the Salad Kingdom

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented. Game is text adventure with minimal real-time movement.

special_mechanics.name: Finger Wars
special_mechanics.description: Rock-paper-scissors mini-game used as primary combat mechanic. Only way to lose the game is by failing to defeat Minister Pumpkin in finger wars.

special_mechanics.name: Maze Navigation
special_mechanics.description: 3D maze navigation segments present in gameplay. Reviewed as obnoxious by some critics.

tier_notes: Princess Tomato is a text adventure game with minimal real-time physics. Sources document gameplay mechanics (finger wars, mazes) but contain no movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data. Game primarily consists of still screens with button-selected commands rather than continuous character movement. No physics documentation available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Princess Tomato in the Salad Kingdom article
Wikipedia - Princess Tomato in the Salad Kingdom article
